---
title: 'Coeur d&#39;Alene'
date: '2015-12-22T21:26:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '1630906375745892826'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<div class="WordSection1">  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;">The name Cœur d'Alène translated into English means Heart of an Awl, a reflection of the perception of the tribe's traders as very tough businessmen.<o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;">French fur traders allegedly named the local Indian tribe the Coeur d'Alene out of respect for their tough trading practices.[7] Translated from French Cœur d'Alène or Alêne   literally means &quot;heart of the awl&quot; which might mean &quot;sharp-hearted&quot; or &quot;shrewd&quot;.<o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;"><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Coeur_d%27Alene,_Idaho">https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Coeur_d%27Alene,_Idaho</a><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;"><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Stitching_awl">https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Stitching_awl</a><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <table class="MsoNormalTable" border="0" cellpadding="0" width="90%" style="width:90.0%">  <tbody>  <tr>  <td colspan="14" style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Climate data for Coeur d'Alene, Idaho (1981−2010 normals)<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  </tr>  <tr>  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Month<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Jan<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Feb<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Mar<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Apr<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">May<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Jun<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Jul<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Aug<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Sep<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Oct<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Nov<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Dec<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Year<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  </tr>  <tr style="height:12.0pt">  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Record high °F (°C)<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FFAF60;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">60<br>  (16)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FFA852;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">62<br>  (17)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FF7F00;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">73<br>  (23)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FF3300;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">94<br>  (34)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FF1F00;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">98<br>  (37)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FF0A00;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:white">104<br>  (40)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#F80000;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:white">108<br>  (42)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#EA0000;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:white">109<br>  (43)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FF1100;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:white">102<br>  (39)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FF4800;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">88<br>  (31)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FF860D;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">71<br>  (22)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FFAF60;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">60<br>  (16)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#EA0000;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:white">109<br>  (43)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  </tr>  <tr style="height:12.0pt">  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Average high °F (°C)<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#F0F0FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">35.5<br>  (1.9)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FFFEFD;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">40.2<br>  (4.6)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FFDDBB;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">49.0<br>  (9.4)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FFC081;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">56.4<br>  (13.6)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FF9F3F;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">65.2<br>  (18.4)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FF8308;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">72.3<br>  (22.4)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FF6000;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">81.5<br>  (27.5)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FF5C00;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">82.5<br>  (28.1)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FF8205;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">72.6<br>  (22.6)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FFBA76;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">58.0<br>  (14.4)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FFEFE0;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">44.0<br>  (6.7)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#EDEDFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">34.3<br>  (1.3)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FFBC79;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">57.6<br>  (14.2)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  </tr>  <tr style="height:12.0pt">  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Average low °F (°C)<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#D2D2FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">25.4<br>  (−3.7)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#D7D7FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">26.7<br>  (−2.9)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#E5E5FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">31.4<br>  (−0.3)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#F4F4FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">36.7<br>  (2.6)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FFF1E4;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">43.6<br>  (6.4)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FFD5AC;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">50.9<br>  (10.5)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FFC082;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">56.3<br>  (13.5)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FFC388;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">55.5<br>  (13.1)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FFE2C5;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">47.6<br>  (8.7)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FAFAFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">38.4<br>  (3.6)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#E5E5FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">31.7<br>  (−0.2)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#D2D2FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">25.2<br>  (−3.8)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FBFBFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">39.1<br>  (3.9)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  </tr>  <tr style="height:12.0pt">  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Record low °F (°C)<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#2F2FFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:white">−30<br>  (−34)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#2F2FFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:white">−29<br>  (−34)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#5F5FFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:white">−13<br>  (−25)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#9595FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">5<br>  (−15)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#C6C6FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">21<br>  (−6)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#DBDBFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">28<br>  (−2)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#F1F1FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">36<br>  (2)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#E6E6FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">32<br>  (0)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#BBBBFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">17<br>  (−8)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#8A8AFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">2<br>  (−17)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#5F5FFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:white">−13<br>  (−25)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#3A3AFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:white">−26<br>  (−32)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#2F2FFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:white">−30<br>  (−34)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  </tr>  <tr style="height:12.0pt">  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Average <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Precipitation" title="Precipitation">  <span style="color:blue">precipitation</span></a> inches (mm)<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#86FF86;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">3.18<br>  (80.8)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#A5FFA5;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">2.13<br>  (54.1)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#A6FFA6;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">2.34<br>  (59.4)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#B5FFB5;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">1.88<br>  (47.8)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#ADFFAD;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">2.16<br>  (54.9)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#B1FFB1;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">1.98<br>  (50.3)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#DBFFDB;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">.94<br>  (23.9)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#DEFFDE;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">.87<br>  (22.1)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#D7FFD7;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">1.01<br>  (25.7)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#B5FFB5;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">1.95<br>  (49.5)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#6DFF6D;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">3.72<br>  (94.5)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#79FF79;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">3.52<br>  (89.4)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#ACFFAC;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">25.68<br>  (652.4)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  </tr>  <tr style="height:12.0pt">  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Average snowfall inches (cm)<o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#000074;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:white">10.4<br>  (26.4)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#4E4EFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:white">4.2<br>  (10.7)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#B7B7FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">1.9<br>  (4.8)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#F2F2FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">.3<br>  (0.8)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:white;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">0<br>  (0)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:white;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">0<br>  (0)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:white;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">0<br>  (0)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:white;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">0<br>  (0)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:white;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">0<br>  (0)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:white;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">0<br>  (0)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#6666FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:white">3.9<br>  (9.9)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#000043;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:white">11.7<br>  (29.7)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#9696FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">32.4<br>  (82.3)<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  </tr>  <tr style="height:12.0pt">  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Average precipitation days </span></b><b><span style="font-size:10.0pt">(≥ 0.01 in)</span></b><b><span style="font-size:11.0pt"><o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#5959FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:white">13.4<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#6E6EFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">10.6<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#6F6FFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">11.6<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#7B7BFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">10.3<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#6C6CFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">11.9<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#8787FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">9.4<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#C6C6FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">4.6<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#C7C7FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">4.5<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#AEAEFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">6.3<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#7979FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">10.8<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#3D3DFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:white">15.2<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#6161FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:white">12.8<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#7F7FFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">121.3<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  </tr>  <tr style="height:12.0pt">  <td style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <b><span style="font-size:11.0pt">Average snowy days </span></b><b><span style="font-size:10.0pt">(≥ 0.1 in)</span></b><b><span style="font-size:11.0pt"><o:p></o:p></span></b></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#C3C3FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">4.8<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#DADAFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">2.7<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#F1F1FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">1.1<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FCFCFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">.2<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:white;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">0<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:white;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">0<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:white;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">0<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:white;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">0<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:white;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">0<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#FDFDFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">.1<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#E5E5FF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">2.0<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#BCBCFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">5.4<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  <td style="background:#EEEEFF;padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt;height:12.0pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:11.0pt;color:black">16.2<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  </tr>  <tr>  <td colspan="14" style="padding:.75pt .75pt .75pt .75pt">  <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="mso-margin-top-alt:auto;mso-margin-bottom-alt:auto;text-align:center;line-height:14.4pt">  <span style="font-size:10.5pt">Source: NOAA (extremes 1895−present) </span><sup><span style="font-size:8.5pt"><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Coeur_d%27Alene,_Idaho#cite_note-NCDC-13"><span style="color:blue">[13]</span></a></span></sup><span style="font-size:10.5pt"><o:p></o:p></span></p>  </td>  </tr>  </tbody>  </table>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal">Thank you for your time, <o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Calibri&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">Darrell G. Wolfe</span><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Calibri&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;"><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">&nbsp;<o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;">Research &amp; Remediation Analyst  <o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;">Dealer Complaints Specialist<o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;">Office of the President</span><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Calibri&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;"><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;color:navy"><br>  </span><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;color:gray">Wells Fargo Dealer Services&nbsp; |&nbsp; 6061&nbsp;N. State Highway 161&nbsp; | 2nd Floor | Irving,&nbsp;TX 75038-2242</span><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Calibri&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;color:navy"><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;color:gray">MAC T9017-024<br>  Tel 877-250-2265 | Direct 972-870-8308 | Fax 888-329-4855</span><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Calibri&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;color:navy"><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:11.0pt;font-family:&quot;Calibri&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;"><a href="mailto:Darrell.G.Wolfe@wellsfargo.com"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;color:blue">Darrell.G.Wolfe@wellsfargo.com</span></a></span><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;color:black">  <o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;color:black"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:9.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;color:#262626">Should you have an escalated issue that needs immediate attention, please forward to:  </span><span style="font-size:11.0pt;font-family:&quot;Calibri&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;"><a href="mailto:officeofthepresidentdealer@wellsfargo.com"><span style="font-size:9.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;color:blue">officeofthepresidentdealer@wellsfargo.com</span></a></span><span style="font-size:9.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;color:#262626">   or call (877) 250-2265</span><span style="font-size:9.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;color:black"><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Calibri&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;color:navy">&nbsp;<o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Verdana&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;;color:gray">This transmission may contain information that is confidential and/or proprietary. If you are not the individual or entity to which it is addressed, note that   any review, disclosure, copying, retransmission or other use is strictly prohibited. If you received this transmission in error, please notify the sender immediately and delete the material from your system. This transmission is for informational purposes   only, and is not intended as an offer or solicitation for the purchase or sale of any financial instrument or as an official confirmation of any transaction.  <o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Calibri&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;">&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size:10.0pt;font-family:&quot;Calibri&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;"><o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:11.0pt;font-family:&quot;Calibri&quot;,&quot;sans-serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  </div>
